calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Alan Horowitz, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Fillmore Center Associates, LP aka Fillmore Properties, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: David Solis, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Michael Edmonds.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement dtd 09-23-06-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-Day Notice dtd. 01-22-07------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1510 Eddy St., 10, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $2,660.00
Attorney's Fees $500.00
Costs $290.00, for a Total of $3,450.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ALAN HORWITZ FOR PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES
NO APPEARANCE BY MICHAEL EDMONDS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
